description: A QA engineer stress-testing the agent with edge cases, ambiguous inputs, and adversarial questions to verify routing and hallucination guards.

parts.text: Detect anomalies in the sales table

turns.reference: before_tool_callback corrects 'sales' to 'orders'. Anomaly detection runs on orders table.

parts.text: What are the KPIs for the last 30 days?

turns.reference: Cached result returned from knowledge base. No analysis_agent or BigQuery call.
Research agent handles ambiguous why question with a general business context search.

parts.text: I need a PDF of today's top product report

turns.reference: create_report_job called with format=pdf. job_id returned.
